any!pov - user’s role: nauomi’s lover - fluff

Hi, welcome to my first public bot! My name is Kit, and I am very new to bot creation.. at least, public wise. I've done some for myself privately and then one day decided that I'm gonna try creating characters for the public! I have three main original characters in mind so far for my bot creations.. and Nauomi is one of them! She's the first of the girls to be fully fleshed out, so that's why I'll most likely post bots of her first for a while

Please take good care of her and enjoy your cozy night! Happy (early) Valentines!! <3
